verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ባእ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወበሎ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይቤ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ አምላከ ፡ ዕብራዊያን ፡ ፈኑ
                  ፡ ሕዝብየ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይፀመዱኒ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Go in to Pharao, and thou shalt say to him, These things saith the Lord God of the Hebrews; Send my people away that they may serve me.
translations.kjv: Then the LORD said unto Moses, Go in unto Pharaoh, and tell him, Thus saith the LORD God of the Hebrews, Let my people go, that they may serve me.

verses.geez: ወእመ ፡ አበይከ ፡ ፈንዎተ ፡ ሕዝብየ ፡ ወዓዲ ፡ አጽናዕኮሙ ፤

translations.lxx: If however thou wilt not send my people away, but yet detainest them:
translations.kjv: For if thou refuse to let them go, and wilt hold them still,

verses.geez:
ናሁ ፡ እደ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ትከውን ፡ ዲበ ፡ እንስሳከ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ ሐቅልከ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ አፍራስ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ አእዱግ ፡ ወዲበ
                  ፡ አግማል ፡ ወዲበ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወዲበ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ሞት ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ጥቀ ።

translations.lxx: behold, the hand of the Lord shall be upon thy cattle in the fields, both on the horses, and on the asses, and on the camels and oxen and sheep, a very great mortality.
translations.kjv: Behold, the hand of the LORD is upon thy cattle which is in the field, upon the horses, upon the asses, upon the camels, upon the oxen, and upon the sheep: there shall be a very grievous murrain.

verses.geez:
ወእሴባሕ ፡ አነ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወኢይመውት ፡ እምኵሉ ፡ ዘደቂቀ ፡
                  እስራኤል ፡ ወኢምንት ።

translations.lxx: And I will make a marvellous distinction in that time between the cattle of the Egyptians, and the cattle of the children of Israel: nothing shall die of all that is of the children's of Israel.
translations.kjv: And the LORD shall sever between the cattle of Israel and the cattle of Egypt: and there shall nothing die of all that is the children’s of Israel.

verses.geez: ወወሀቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዕድሜ ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ጌሠመ ፡ ይገብር ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ዘነገረ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And God fixed a limit, saying, To-morrow the Lord will do this thing on the land.
translations.kjv: And the LORD appointed a set time, saying, To morrow the LORD shall do this thing in the land.

verses.geez:
ወገብረ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ዘነገረ ፡ በሳኒታ ፡ ወሞተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወእምእንስሳ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤልሰ ፡
                  ኢሞተ ፡ ወኢአሐዱ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord did this thing on the next day, and all the cattle of the Egyptians died, but of the cattle of the children of Israel there died not one.
translations.kjv: And the LORD did that thing on the morrow, and all the cattle of Egypt died: but of the cattle of the children of Israel died not one.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእየ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢሞተ ፡ እምእንስሳ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወኢአሐዱ ፡ ከብደ ፡ ልቡ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡
                  ወኢፈነዎ ፡ ለሕዝብ ።

translations.lxx: And when Pharao saw, that of all the cattle of the children of Israel there died not one, the heart of Pharao was hardened, and he did not let the people go.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh sent, and, behold, there was not one of the cattle of the Israelites dead. And the heart of Pharaoh was hardened, and he did not let the people go.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለአሮን ፡ ንሥኡ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ምልአ ፡ እደዊክሙ ፡ ሐመደ ፡ እቶን ፡ ወይዝርዎ ፡ ሙሴ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወበቅድመ ፡ ዐበይቱ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying, Take you handfuls of ashes of the furnace, and let Moses scatter it toward heaven before Pharao, and before his servants.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses and unto Aaron, Take to you handfuls of ashes of the furnace, and let Moses sprinkle it toward the heaven in the sight of Pharaoh.

verses.geez:
ወይከውን ፡ ቆባር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወኩን ፡ ዲበ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ አጽልዕት ፡
                  ዘይፈልሕ ፡ ዲበ ፡ እጓለ ፡ እመሕይው ፡ ወዲበ ፡ ዘአርባዕቱ ፡ እግሩ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And let it become dust over all the land of Egypt, and there shall be upon men and upon beasts sore blains breaking forth both on men and on beasts, in all the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And it shall become small dust in all the land of Egypt, and shall be a boil breaking forth with blains upon man, and upon beast, throughout all the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወነሥኡ ፡ ሐመደ ፡ እቶን ፡ በቅድመ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወዘረዎ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ አጽልዕተ ፡ ዘይፈልሕ ፡
                  ዲበ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ እንስሳ ።

translations.lxx: So he took of the ashes of the furnace before Pharao, and Moses scattered it toward heaven, and it became sore blains breaking forth both on men and on beasts.
translations.kjv: And they took ashes of the furnace, and stood before Pharaoh; and Moses sprinkled it up toward heaven; and it became a boil breaking forth with blains upon man, and upon beast.

verses.geez:
ወስእኑ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሥራይ ፡ ቀዊመ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ጸልዕ ፡ እስመ ፡ አኀዘቶሙ ፡ ጸልዕ ፡ ለመሠርያን ፡
                  ወለኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And the sorcerers could not stand before Moses because of the sores, for the sores were on the sorcerers, and in all the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And the magicians could not stand before Moses because of the boils; for the boil was upon the magicians, and upon all the Egyptians.

verses.geez: ወአጽንዐ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ልቦ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወኢሰምዖሙ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለሙሴ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord hardened Pharao's heart, and he hearkened not to them, as the Lord appointed.
translations.kjv: And the LORD hardened the heart of Pharaoh, and he hearkened not unto them; as the LORD had spoken unto Moses.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ጊሥ ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ወቁም ፡ ቅድሜሁ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወበሎ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይቤ ፡ እግዚእ ፡
                  አምላከ ፡ ዕብራዊያን ፡ ፈኑ ፡ ሕዝብየ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይፀመዱኒ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Rise up early in the morning, and stand before Pharao; and thou shalt say to him, These things saith the Lord God of the Hebrews, Send away my people that they may serve me.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Rise up early in the morning, and stand before Pharaoh, and say unto him, Thus saith the LORD God of the Hebrews, Let my people go, that they may serve me.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ይእዜ ፡ በዝ ፡ ጊዜ ፡ አነ ፡ እፌኑ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ መዐትየ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ልብከ ፡ ወለዐበይትከ ፡ ወለሕዝብከ ፡ ከመ
                  ፡ ታእምር ፡ ከመ ፡ አልቦቱ ፡ ከማየ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: For at this present time do I send forth all my plagues into thine heart, and the heart of thy servants and of thy people; that thou mayest know that there is not another such as I in all the earth.
translations.kjv: For I will at this time send all my plagues upon thine heart, and upon thy servants, and upon thy people; that thou mayest know that there is none like me in all the earth.

verses.geez: ወይእዜ ፡ እፌኑ ፡ እዴየ ፡ ወእዘብጠከ ፡ ወለሕዝብከሂ ፡ ወእቀትለክሙ ፡ ወትትቀጠቀጥ ፡ እምድር ።

translations.lxx: For now I will stretch forth my hand and smite thee and kill thy people, and thou shalt be consumed from off the earth.
translations.kjv: For now I will stretch out my hand, that I may smite thee and thy people with pestilence; and thou shalt be cut off from the earth.

verses.geez: ወበእንተዝ ፡ ዐቀብኩከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኣርኢ ፡ ብከ ፡ ጽንዕየ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ይትየዳዕ ፡ ስምየ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምደር ።

translations.lxx: And for this purpose hast thou been preserved, that I might display in thee my strength, and that my name might be published in all the earth.
translations.kjv: And in very deed for this cause have I raised thee up, for to shew in thee my power; and that my name may be declared throughout all the earth.

verses.geez: ወዓዲከ ፡ አንተሰ ፡ ታጸንዕ ፡ ሕዝብየ ፡ ወኢትፌንዎሙ ፤

translations.lxx: Dost thou then yet exert thyself to hinder my people, so as not to let them go?
translations.kjv: As yet exaltest thou thyself against my people, that thou wilt not let them go?

verses.geez:
ናሁ ፡ አነ ፡ አዘንም ፡ ጌሠመ ፡ ዘጊዜ ፡ በረ[ደ] ፡ ብዙ[ኀ] ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ዘኢኮነ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ እምአመ ፡ ተፈጥረ ፡
                  ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ እስከ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: Behold, to-morrow at this hour I will rain a very great hail, such as has not been in Egypt, from the time it was created until this day.
translations.kjv: Behold, to morrow about this time I will cause it to rain a very grievous hail, such as hath not been in Egypt since the foundation thereof even until now.

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ አፍጥን ፡ አስተጋብእ ፡ እንስሳከ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ዘብከ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሐቅል ፡ እስመ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ወእንስሳ
                  ፡ ዘተረክበ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሐቅል ፡ ወኢቦአ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ይወድቅ ፡ ዲቤሁ ፡ በረድ ፡ ወይመውት ።

translations.lxx: Now then hasten to gather thy cattle, and all that thou hast in the fields; for all the men and cattle as many as shall be found in the fields, and shall not enter into a house, (but the hail shall fall upon them,) shall die.
translations.kjv: Send therefore now, and gather thy cattle, and all that thou hast in the field; for upon every man and beast which shall be found in the field, and shall not be brought home, the hail shall come down upon them, and they shall die.

verses.geez: ወዘፈርሀ ፡ ቃለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እምዐበይተ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ አስተጋብአ ፡ እንስሳሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አብያት ።

translations.lxx: He of the servants of Pharao that feared the word of the Lord, gathered his cattle into the houses.
translations.kjv: He that feared the word of the LORD among the servants of Pharaoh made his servants and his cattle flee into the houses:

verses.geez: ወዘኢሐለየሰ ፡ በልቡ ፡ ቃለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኀደገ ፡ እንስሳሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ።

translations.lxx: And he that did not attend in his mind to the word of the Lord, left the cattle in the fields.
translations.kjv: And he that regarded not the word of the LORD left his servants and his cattle in the field.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ስፋሕ ፡ እዴከ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ወይኩን ፡ በረድ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ
                  ፡ ዲበ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሣዕር ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Stretch out thine hand to heaven, and there shall be hail on all the land of Egypt, both on the men and on the cattle, and on all the herbage on the land.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Stretch forth thine hand toward heaven, that there may be hail in all the land of Egypt, upon man, and upon beast, and upon every herb of the field, throughout the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወሰፍሐ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ወወሀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ቃለ ፡ ወበረደ ፡ ወሮጸት ፡ እሳት ፡ ዲበ ፡
                  ምድር ፡ ወአዝነመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በረደ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses stretched forth his hand to heaven, and the Lord sent thunderings and hail; and the fire ran along upon the ground, and the Lord rained hail on all the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And Moses stretched forth his rod toward heaven: and the LORD sent thunder and hail, and the fire ran along upon the ground; and the LORD rained hail upon the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወእሳቱ ፡ ይነድድ ፡ ውስተ ፡ በረዱ ፡ ወበረድሰ ፡ ብዙኅ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ወዕዙዝ ፡ ዘኢኮነ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ እምአመ ፡ ተፈጥረ ፡
                  አሕዛብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: So there was hail and flaming fire mingled with hail; and the hail was very great, such as was not in Egypt, from the time there was a nation upon it.
translations.kjv: So there was hail, and fire mingled with the hail, very grievous, such as there was none like it in all the land of Egypt since it became a nation.

verses.geez:
ወቀተ[ለ] ፡ በረድ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ እምሰብእ ፡ እስከ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ሣዕረ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡
                  አማሰነ ፡ በረድ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዕፀወ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ሐቅል ፡ ቀጥቀጠ ።

translations.lxx: And the hail smote in all the land of Egypt both man and beast, and the hail smote all the grass in the field, and the hail broke in pieces all the trees in the field.
translations.kjv: And the hail smote throughout all the land of Egypt all that was in the field, both man and beast; and the hail smote every herb of the field, and brake every tree of the field.

verses.geez: ዘእንበለ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ጌሤም ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ኢወረደ ፡ በረድ ።

translations.lxx: Only in the land of Gesem where the children of Israel were, the hail was not.
translations.kjv: Only in the land of Goshen, where the children of Israel were, was there no hail.

verses.geez:
ወለአከ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወጸውዖሙ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለአሮን ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ አበስኩ ፡ ይእዜሂ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ጻድቅ ፡ ወአንሰ
                  ፡ ወሕዝብየ ፡ ረሲዓን ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao sent and called Moses and Aaron, and said to them, I have sinned this time: the Lord is righteous, and I and my people are wicked.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh sent, and called for Moses and Aaron, and said unto them, I have sinned this time: the LORD is righteous, and I and my people are wicked.

verses.geez:
ጸልዩ ፡ እነከሰ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወይህዳእ ፡ እንከ ፡ ወኢይኩን ፡ ቃለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በረድሂ ፡ ወእሳትሂ ፤
                  ወእፌንወክሙ ፡ ወኢያነብረክሙ ፡ ዳግመ ።

translations.lxx: Pray then for me to the Lord, and let him cause the thunderings of God to cease, and the hail and the fire, and I will send you forth and ye shall remain no longer.
translations.kjv: Intreat the LORD (for it is enough) that there be no more mighty thunderings and hail; and I will let you go, and ye shall stay no longer.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ሶበ ፡ ወፃእኩ ፡ እምሀገር ፡ ኣሌዕል ፡ እደዊየ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወየሀድእ ፡ ቃል
                  ፡ ወበረድኒ ፡ ወዝናምኒ ፡ አልቦ ፡ እንከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ታእምር ፡ ከመ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And Moses said to him, When I shall have departed from the city, I will stretch out my hands to the Lord, and the thunderings shall cease, and the hail and the rain shall be no longer, that thou mayest know that the earth is the Lord's.
translations.kjv: And Moses said unto him, As soon as I am gone out of the city, I will spread abroad my hands unto the LORD; and the thunder shall cease, neither shall there be any more hail; that thou mayest know how that the earth is the LORD’s.

verses.geez: ወአንተሰ ፡ ወዐበይትከ ፡ ኣአምር ፡ እምአመ ፡ ኮንክሙ ፡ ኢፈራህክምዎ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: But as for thee and thy servants, I know that ye have not yet feared the Lord.
translations.kjv: But as for thee and thy servants, I know that ye will not yet fear the LORD God.

verses.geez: ትለቤ ፡ ወስገም ፡ ትማስን ፡ ወስገምሰ ፡ እንበለ ፡ ይስበል ፡ [ተዘብጠ ፡] ወትለቤ ፡ በዘ ፡ አውጽአ ፡ ዘርአ ።

translations.lxx: And the flax and the barley were smitten, for the barley was advanced, and the flax was seeding.
translations.kjv: And the flax and the barley was smitten: for the barley was in the ear, and the flax was bolled.

verses.geez: ወስርናይ ፡ ወዐተር ፡ ኢ[ተዘብጠ ፡] እስመ ፡ ብሱል ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: But the wheat and the rye were not smitten, for they were late.
translations.kjv: But the wheat and the rie were not smitten: for they were not grown up.

verses.geez:
ወወፅአ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ አፍአ ፡ እምሀገር ፡ ወአልዐለ ፡ እደዊሁ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወሀድአ ፡ ቃል
                  ፡ ወበረድ ፡ ወዝናምሂ ፡ ኢነፍነፈ ፡ እንከ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And Moses went forth from Pharao out of the city, and stretched out his hands to the Lord, and the thunders ceased and the hail, and the rain did not drop on the earth.
translations.kjv: And Moses went out of the city from Pharaoh, and spread abroad his hands unto the LORD: and the thunders and hail ceased, and the rain was not poured upon the earth.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእየ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ከመ ፡ ሀድአ ፡ ዝናም ፡ ወበረድ ፡ ወቃል ፡ ወሰከ ፡ አብሶ ፡ ወአክበደ ፡ ልቦ ፡
                  ወለዐበይቱሂ ።

translations.lxx: And when Pharao saw that the rain and the hail and the thunders ceased, he continued to sin; and he hardened his heart, and the heart of his servants.
translations.kjv: And when Pharaoh saw that the rain and the hail and the thunders were ceased, he sinned yet more, and hardened his heart, he and his servants.

verses.geez: ወጸንዐ ፡ ልቡ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወኢፈነዎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በከመ ፡ ነገሮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ።

translations.lxx: And the heart of Pharao was hardened, and he did not send forth the children of Israel, as the Lord said to Moses.
translations.kjv: And the heart of Pharaoh was hardened, neither would he let the children of Israel go; as the LORD had spoken by Moses.
